lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਕਰਤਾ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਨਿਰਭਉ ਨਿਰਵੈਰੁ ਅਕਾਲ ਮੂਰਤਿ ਅਜੂਨੀ ਸੈਭੰ ਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar sat naam karataa purakh nirbhau niravair akaal moorat ajoonee saibhan gur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. Truth Is The Name. Creative Being Personified. No Fear. No Hatred. Image Of The Undying. Beyond Birth. Self-Existent. By Guru's Grace:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਰਠਿ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ਘਰੁ ੧ ਚਉਪਦੇ ॥
lines.translit: soratth mahalaa 1 ghar 1 chaupade |
lines.english: Sorat'h, First Mehl, First House, Chau-Padhay:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੁਛਹੁ ਜਾਇ ਸਿਆਣਿਆ ਆਗੈ ਮਿਲਣੁ ਕਿਨਾਹ ॥
lines.translit: puchhahu jaae siaaniaa aagai milan kinaah |
lines.english: Go and ask the clever people, whether they shall meet in the world hereafter.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਮੇਰਾ ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਵੀਸਰੈ ਵਡੜੀ ਵੇਦਨ ਤਿਨਾਹ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jin meraa saahib veesarai vaddarree vedan tinaah |1|
lines.english: Those who forget my Lord and Master shall suffer in terrible pain. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭਨਾ ਮਰਣਾ ਆਇਆ ਵੇਛੋੜਾ ਸਭਨਾਹ ॥
lines.translit: sabhanaa maranaa aaeaa vechhorraa sabhanaah |
lines.english: Death comes to all, and all must suffer separation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੀ ਸਾਲਾਹਿਹੁ ਸਾਚਾ ਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: bhee saalaahihu saachaa soe |
lines.english: So praise the True Lord,

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕੀ ਨਦਰਿ ਸਦਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਹੋਇ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kee nadar sadaa sukh hoe | rahaau |
lines.english: by whose Grace peace ever prevails. ||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਡਾ ਕਰਿ ਸਾਲਾਹਣਾ ਹੈ ਭੀ ਹੋਸੀ ਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: vaddaa kar saalaahanaa hai bhee hosee soe |
lines.english: Praise Him as great; He is, and He shall ever be.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਤਿਸੁ ਭਾਵੈ ਸੋ ਥੀਐ ਰੰਨ ਕਿ ਰੁੰਨੈ ਹੋਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jo tis bhaavai so theeai ran ki runai hoe |2|
lines.english: Whatever pleases Him, comes to pass; what good does it do to cry out in protest? ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭਨਾ ਦਾਤਾ ਏਕੁ ਤੂ ਮਾਣਸ ਦਾਤਿ ਨ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: sabhanaa daataa ek too maanas daat na hoe |
lines.english: You alone are the Great Giver; mankind cannot give anything.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਰਤੀ ਉਪਰਿ ਕੋਟ ਗੜ ਕੇਤੀ ਗਈ ਵਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: dharatee upar kott garr ketee gee vajaae |
lines.english: Many have proclaimed their sovereignty over millions of fortresses on the earth, but they have now departed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਅਸਮਾਨਿ ਨ ਮਾਵਨੀ ਤਿਨ ਨਕਿ ਨਥਾ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jo asamaan na maavanee tin nak nathaa paae |
lines.english: And those, whom even the sky could not contain, had ropes put through their noses.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਮਨ ਜਾਣਹਿ ਸੂਲੀਆ ਕਾਹੇ ਮਿਠਾ ਖਾਹਿ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: je man jaaneh sooleea kaahe mitthaa khaeh |3|
lines.english: O mind, if you only knew the torment in your future, you would not relish the sweet pleasures of the present. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਅਉਗੁਣ ਜੇਤੜੇ ਤੇਤੇ ਗਲੀ ਜੰਜੀਰ ॥
lines.translit: naanak aaugun jetarre tete galee janjeer |
lines.english: O Nanak, as many as are the sins one commits, so many are the chains around his neck.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਗੁਣ ਹੋਨਿ ਤ ਕਟੀਅਨਿ ਸੇ ਭਾਈ ਸੇ ਵੀਰ ॥
lines.translit: je gun hon ta katteean se bhaaee se veer |
lines.english: If he possesses virtues, then the chains are cut away; these virtues are his brothers, his true brothers.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਗੈ ਗਏ ਨ ਮੰਨੀਅਨਿ ਮਾਰਿ ਕਢਹੁ ਵੇਪੀਰ ॥੪॥੧॥
lines.translit: agai ge na maneean maar kadtahu vepeer |4|1|
lines.english: Going to the world hereafter, those who have no Guru are not accepted; they are beaten, and expelled. ||4||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਬੀਜੁ ਸੰਤੋਖੁ ਸੁਹਾਗਾ ਰਖੁ ਗਰੀਬੀ ਵੇਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: naam beej santokh suhaagaa rakh gareebee ves |
lines.english: Let the Lord's Name be the seed, contentment the plow, and your humble dress the fence.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਰਠਿ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ਘਰੁ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: soratth mahalaa 1 ghar 1 |
lines.english: Sorat'h, First Mehl, First House:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਹਾਲੀ ਕਿਰਸਾਣੀ ਕਰਣੀ ਸਰਮੁ ਪਾਣੀ ਤਨੁ ਖੇਤੁ ॥
lines.translit: man haalee kirasaanee karanee saram paanee tan khet |
lines.english: Make your mind the farmer, good deeds the farm, modesty the water, and your body the field.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਬਾ ਮਾਇਆ ਸਾਥਿ ਨ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: baabaa maaeaa saath na hoe |
lines.english: O Baba, the wealth of Maya does not go with anyone.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਾਉ ਕਰਮ ਕਰਿ ਜੰਮਸੀ ਸੇ ਘਰ ਭਾਗਠ ਦੇਖੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: bhaau karam kar jamasee se ghar bhaagatth dekh |1|
lines.english: Doing deeds of love, the seed shall sprout, and you shall see your home flourish. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਨਿ ਮਾਇਆ ਜਗੁ ਮੋਹਿਆ ਵਿਰਲਾ ਬੂਝੈ ਕੋਇ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: ein maaeaa jag mohiaa viralaa boojhai koe | rahaau |
lines.english: This Maya has bewitched the world, but only a rare few understand this. ||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਾਣੁ ਹਟੁ ਕਰਿ ਆਰਜਾ ਸਚੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਕਰਿ ਵਥੁ ॥
lines.translit: haan hatt kar aarajaa sach naam kar vath |
lines.english: Make your ever-decreasing life your shop, and make the Lord's Name your merchandise.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਣਜਾਰਿਆ ਸਿਉ ਵਣਜੁ ਕਰਿ ਲੈ ਲਾਹਾ ਮਨ ਹਸੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: vanajaariaa siau vanaj kar lai laahaa man has |2|
lines.english: Deal with the Lord's dealers, earn your profits, and rejoice in your mind. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਰਤਿ ਸੋਚ ਕਰਿ ਭਾਂਡਸਾਲ ਤਿਸੁ ਵਿਚਿ ਤਿਸ ਨੋ ਰਖੁ ॥
lines.translit: surat soch kar bhaanddasaal tis vich tis no rakh |
lines.english: Make understanding and contemplation your warehouse, and in that warehouse, store the Lord's Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਰਚੁ ਬੰਨੁ ਚੰਗਿਆਈਆ ਮਤੁ ਮਨ ਜਾਣਹਿ ਕਲੁ ॥
lines.translit: kharach ban changiaaeea mat man jaaneh kal |
lines.english: Gather up merits for your travelling expenses, and do not think of tomorrow in your mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਣਿ ਸਾਸਤ ਸਉਦਾਗਰੀ ਸਤੁ ਘੋੜੇ ਲੈ ਚਲੁ ॥
lines.translit: sun saasat saudaagaree sat ghorre lai chal |
lines.english: Let your trade be listening to scripture, and let Truth be the horses you take to sell.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਾਇ ਚਿਤੁ ਕਰਿ ਚਾਕਰੀ ਮੰਨਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਕਰਿ ਕੰਮੁ ॥
lines.translit: laae chit kar chaakaree man naam kar kam |
lines.english: Let your service be the focusing of your consciousness, and let your occupation be the placing of faith in the Naam.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਰੰਕਾਰ ਕੈ ਦੇਸਿ ਜਾਹਿ ਤਾ ਸੁਖਿ ਲਹਹਿ ਮਹਲੁ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: nirankaar kai des jaeh taa sukh laheh mehal |3|
lines.english: When you arrive in the land of the Formless Lord, you shall find peace in the Mansion of His Presence. ||3||
